welcome: Welcome! Tap the button to sign up 🏁
greeting: Hi {name}! Let's get you on the track 🏁
terms:
Before entering the track, all participants must read the current rules and follow them without exception.

Not allowed on the track:
— pregnant women;
— people weighing over 120 kg;
— children under 140 cm tall;
— anyone intoxicated, under the influence of drugs or psychotropic substances, or behaving suspiciously;
— anyone with medical contraindications or who is unwell.

Before getting into a kart, participants must remove anything that hampers control or safety, tuck in loose clothing, and take all hard and sharp objects out of their clothes.

To keep personal belongings safe, we strongly recommend leaving them in a locked locker or another safe place. The organizers are not responsible for visitors' personal belongings!

Registration for a race is done in the changing room after buying a ticket.

Wearing a helmet and balaclava to protect the head is mandatory! Long hair must be tucked under the helmet!

In an emergency, stop and, staying in the kart, raise your hand and wait for the instructor. If the instructor gives a signal, slowly stop at the edge of the track and listen carefully to their instructions.

The instructor signals the end of a race with a flag. When this happens, slow down and drive slowly to the pit stop. You may only get out of the kart with the instructor's permission.

You will be removed from the race early after 1 hard or 2 light collisions, or 2 warnings for rule violations. The ticket price is non-refundable in this case.

For failing to follow the operating rules, violating the briefing, or disrespectful or offensive behavior toward staff or other participants, the offender will be denied rental and a refund for services not received.

Strictly forbidden:
1. Entering the track area without the instructor's permission.
2. Touching the engine, or starting or stopping it yourself.
3. Starting to move, or getting up from the kart, without the instructor's permission.
4. Pressing two pedals at once.
5. Creating dangerous situations on the track that could harm your own health, other participants, staff, or the karting center's property — including driving into the pit stop at high speed! Steering with one hand, or sticking hands and feet outside the kart's safety frame while driving.
6. Going in the direction opposite to the main flow.
7. Riding with bags, backpacks, scarves, a bare torso, or (for girls) in skirts and dresses.
8. Riding in open footwear (flip-flops, sandals) or high-heeled shoes.
terms-must-accept: Please accept the rules to continue — tap «✅ I accept», or /cancel.
minor-leader: You must be at least 18 to register a group. Please ask an adult to register on your behalf.
ask-self: Tap to share your number, or just type your details — name, phone or email, and birthday. You can send them all in one message.
ask-contact: A phone or email to reach them? Share a contact or type it.
guardian: {name} is under 18. To add them, confirm: «I take responsibility for this minor».
ask-consent: Do you consent to us using your contact details for marketing and news about the center?
add-another: Who's next? Attach their contact 📎 or type their details.
done: All set 🏁 See you at the track!
